expectations.text: Output file is a .md file in the outputs directory

expectations.evidence: ## Summary present with one-paragraph overview including all key facts
## Timeline with 7 entries using relative +00:XX format (appropriate since no wall-clock times given)

expectations.text: Document contains a ## Root Cause section
expectations.evidence: ## Root Cause present explaining the null assumption and dependent index complication

expectations.text: Document contains an ## Impact section (or equivalent coverage of impact)
expectations.evidence: ## Impact with Systems/Users/Duration/Data breakdown — correctly identifies 'internal only' for users

expectations.text: Document contains a ## Resolution section with the specific SQL commands used
expectations.evidence: ## Resolution includes exact SQL: DROP INDEX CONCURRENTLY, UPDATE...WHERE confirmed_at IS NULL, rake commands

expectations.text: Document contains an ## Action Items section with at least one checklist item
expectations.evidence: 4 checkbox action items including production backfill prerequisite, audit, and documentation

expectations.text: Document contains a ## Lessons Learned section
expectations.evidence: Lessons Learned with 3 specific, non-generic lessons including the backfill value judgment call nuance

expectations.text: Severity field uses the defined scale (Critical, High, Medium, or Low) and is Medium or Low (staging only, no users affected)
expectations.evidence: **Severity**: Medium — correct classification, uses defined scale

expectations.text: Root cause explains why the migration failed — the null assumption and why it wasn't caught
expectations.evidence: Root cause explains the null assumption, 4312 legacy rows from 2021, and the PostgreSQL enforcement mechanism
